// Generated by xlsynth::aot_builder from build spec "wide_sizes"
// (top="wide_sizes", function="wide_sizes").

unsafe extern "C" {
    #[link_name = "wide_sizes"]
    fn __xlsynth_aot_linked_symbol_wide_sizes();
}

const ENTRYPOINTS_PROTO: &[u8] = include_bytes!("wide_sizes.entrypoints.pb");
const INPUT_BUFFER_SIZES: &[usize] = &[112];
const INPUT_BUFFER_ALIGNMENTS: &[usize] = &[16];
const OUTPUT_BUFFER_SIZES: &[usize] = &[112];
const OUTPUT_BUFFER_ALIGNMENTS: &[usize] = &[16];

#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq)]
pub struct Token {}

pub type Bits1 = bool;
pub type Bits7 = u8;
pub type Bits8 = u8;
pub type Bits16 = u16;
pub type Bits32 = u32;
pub type Bits64 = u64;
pub type Bits65 = [u8; 9];
pub type Bits73 = [u8; 10];
pub type Bits127 = [u8; 16];

#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq)]
pub struct Input0 {
    pub field0: Bits1,
    pub field1: Bits7,
    pub field2: Bits8,
    pub field3: Bits16,
    pub field4: Bits32,
    pub field5: Bits64,
    pub field6: Bits65,
    pub field7: Bits73,
    pub field8: Bits127,
    pub field9: [Bits65; 2],
}

#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq)]
pub struct Output {
    pub field0: Bits1,
    pub field1: Bits7,
    pub field2: Bits8,
    pub field3: Bits16,
    pub field4: Bits32,
    pub field5: Bits64,
    pub field6: Bits65,
    pub field7: Bits73,
    pub field8: Bits127,
    pub field9: [Bits65; 2],
}

const INPUT0_LAYOUT: &[xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout] = &[
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 0,
        data_size: 1,
        padded_size: 1,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 1,
        data_size: 1,
        padded_size: 1,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 2,
        data_size: 1,
        padded_size: 1,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 4,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 8,
        data_size: 4,
        padded_size: 4,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 16,
        data_size: 8,
        padded_size: 8,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 32,
        data_size: 9,
        padded_size: 16,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 48,
        data_size: 10,
        padded_size: 16,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 64,
        data_size: 16,
        padded_size: 16,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 80,
        data_size: 9,
        padded_size: 16,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 96,
        data_size: 9,
        padded_size: 16,
    },
];
const OUTPUT0_LAYOUT: &[xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout] = &[
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 0,
        data_size: 1,
        padded_size: 1,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 1,
        data_size: 1,
        padded_size: 1,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 2,
        data_size: 1,
        padded_size: 1,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 4,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 8,
        data_size: 4,
        padded_size: 4,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 16,
        data_size: 8,
        padded_size: 8,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 32,
        data_size: 9,
        padded_size: 16,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 48,
        data_size: 10,
        padded_size: 16,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 64,
        data_size: 16,
        padded_size: 16,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 80,
        data_size: 9,
        padded_size: 16,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 96,
        data_size: 9,
        padded_size: 16,
    },
];

#[allow(clippy::deref_addrof, clippy::explicit_auto_deref, clippy::identity_op)]
fn encode_input_0(_value: &Input0, dst: &mut [u8]) {
    debug_assert_eq!(dst.len(), 112);
    dst.fill(0);
    let encoded_bit: u8 = u8::from(*&((_value).field0));
    xlsynth::aot_runner::write_leaf_element(dst, &INPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize], &[encoded_bit]);
    assert!(
        (((_value).field1) >> 7) == 0,
        "AOT encode overflow: value does not fit in 7 bits"
    );
    xlsynth::aot_runner::write_leaf_element(
        dst,
        &INPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize + 1],
        &((_value).field1).to_ne_bytes(),
    );
    xlsynth::aot_runner::write_leaf_element(
        dst,
        &INPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize + 2],
        &((_value).field2).to_ne_bytes(),
    );
    xlsynth::aot_runner::write_leaf_element(
        dst,
        &INPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize + 3],
        &((_value).field3).to_ne_bytes(),
    );
    xlsynth::aot_runner::write_leaf_element(
        dst,
        &INPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize + 4],
        &((_value).field4).to_ne_bytes(),
    );
    xlsynth::aot_runner::write_leaf_element(
        dst,
        &INPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize + 5],
        &((_value).field5).to_ne_bytes(),
    );
    assert!(
        (((_value).field6)[8] >> 1) == 0,
        "AOT encode overflow: value does not fit in 65 bits"
    );
    xlsynth::aot_runner::write_leaf_element(dst, &INPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize + 6], &((_value).field6));
    assert!(
        (((_value).field7)[9] >> 1) == 0,
        "AOT encode overflow: value does not fit in 73 bits"
    );
    xlsynth::aot_runner::write_leaf_element(dst, &INPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize + 7], &((_value).field7));
    assert!(
        (((_value).field8)[15] >> 7) == 0,
        "AOT encode overflow: value does not fit in 127 bits"
    );
    xlsynth::aot_runner::write_leaf_element(dst, &INPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize + 8], &((_value).field8));
    for index_0 in 0..2 {
        assert!(
            ((((_value).field9)[index_0])[8] >> 1) == 0,
            "AOT encode overflow: value does not fit in 65 bits"
        );
        xlsynth::aot_runner::write_leaf_element(
            dst,
            &INPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize + 9 + index_0],
            &(((_value).field9)[index_0]),
        );
    }
    debug_assert_eq!(INPUT0_LAYOUT.len(), 11);
}

#[allow(clippy::identity_op, clippy::let_and_return)]
fn decode_output_0(src: &[u8]) -> Output {
    debug_assert_eq!(src.len(), 112);
    let output: Output = Output {
        field0: {
            let mut dst_bytes = [0u8; 1];
            xlsynth::aot_runner::read_leaf_element(src, &OUTPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize], &mut dst_bytes);
            assert!(
                dst_bytes[0] <= 1,
                "AOT decode overflow: value does not fit in 1 bit"
            );
            dst_bytes[0] != 0
        },
        field1: {
            let mut dst_bytes = [0u8; 1];
            xlsynth::aot_runner::read_leaf_element(
                src,
                &OUTPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize + 1],
                &mut dst_bytes,
            );
            let decoded = u8::from_ne_bytes(dst_bytes);
            assert!(
                (decoded >> 7) == 0,
                "AOT decode overflow: value does not fit in 7 bits"
            );
            decoded
        },
        field2: {
            let mut dst_bytes = [0u8; 1];
            xlsynth::aot_runner::read_leaf_element(
                src,
                &OUTPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize + 2],
                &mut dst_bytes,
            );
            let decoded = u8::from_ne_bytes(dst_bytes);
            decoded
        },
        field3: {
            let mut dst_bytes = [0u8; 2];
            xlsynth::aot_runner::read_leaf_element(
                src,
                &OUTPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize + 3],
                &mut dst_bytes,
            );
            let decoded = u16::from_ne_bytes(dst_bytes);
            decoded
        },
        field4: {
            let mut dst_bytes = [0u8; 4];
            xlsynth::aot_runner::read_leaf_element(
                src,
                &OUTPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize + 4],
                &mut dst_bytes,
            );
            let decoded = u32::from_ne_bytes(dst_bytes);
            decoded
        },
        field5: {
            let mut dst_bytes = [0u8; 8];
            xlsynth::aot_runner::read_leaf_element(
                src,
                &OUTPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize + 5],
                &mut dst_bytes,
            );
            let decoded = u64::from_ne_bytes(dst_bytes);
            decoded
        },
        field6: {
            let mut dst_bytes = [0u8; 9];
            xlsynth::aot_runner::read_leaf_element(
                src,
                &OUTPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize + 6],
                &mut dst_bytes,
            );
            assert!(
                (dst_bytes[8] >> 1) == 0,
                "AOT decode overflow: value does not fit in 65 bits"
            );
            dst_bytes
        },
        field7: {
            let mut dst_bytes = [0u8; 10];
            xlsynth::aot_runner::read_leaf_element(
                src,
                &OUTPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize + 7],
                &mut dst_bytes,
            );
            assert!(
                (dst_bytes[9] >> 1) == 0,
                "AOT decode overflow: value does not fit in 73 bits"
            );
            dst_bytes
        },
        field8: {
            let mut dst_bytes = [0u8; 16];
            xlsynth::aot_runner::read_leaf_element(
                src,
                &OUTPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize + 8],
                &mut dst_bytes,
            );
            assert!(
                (dst_bytes[15] >> 7) == 0,
                "AOT decode overflow: value does not fit in 127 bits"
            );
            dst_bytes
        },
        field9: std::array::from_fn(|index_0| {
            let mut dst_bytes = [0u8; 9];
            xlsynth::aot_runner::read_leaf_element(
                src,
                &OUTPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize + 9 + index_0],
                &mut dst_bytes,
            );
            assert!(
                (dst_bytes[8] >> 1) == 0,
                "AOT decode overflow: value does not fit in 65 bits"
            );
            dst_bytes
        }),
    };
    debug_assert_eq!(OUTPUT0_LAYOUT.len(), 11);
    output
}

pub fn descriptor() -> xlsynth::AotEntrypointDescriptor<'static> {
    unsafe {
        xlsynth::AotEntrypointDescriptor::from_raw_parts_unchecked(
            ENTRYPOINTS_PROTO,
            __xlsynth_aot_linked_symbol_wide_sizes as *const () as usize,
            xlsynth::AotEntrypointMetadata {
                symbol: "wide_sizes".to_string(),
                input_buffer_sizes: INPUT_BUFFER_SIZES.to_vec(),
                input_buffer_alignments: INPUT_BUFFER_ALIGNMENTS.to_vec(),
                output_buffer_sizes: OUTPUT_BUFFER_SIZES.to_vec(),
                output_buffer_alignments: OUTPUT_BUFFER_ALIGNMENTS.to_vec(),
                temp_buffer_size: 0,
                temp_buffer_alignment: 1,
            },
        )
    }
}

pub struct Runner {
    inner: xlsynth::AotRunner<'static>,
}

impl Runner {
    pub fn new() -> Result<Self, xlsynth::XlsynthError> {
        Ok(Self {
            inner: xlsynth::AotRunner::new(descriptor())?,
        })
    }

    pub fn run_with_events(
        &mut self,
        input: &Input0,
    ) -> Result<xlsynth::AotRunResult<Output>, xlsynth::XlsynthError> {
        encode_input_0(input, self.inner.input_mut(0));
        self.inner.run_with_events(|inner| {
            let output = decode_output_0(inner.output(0));
            output
        })
    }

    pub fn run(&mut self, input: &Input0) -> Result<Output, xlsynth::XlsynthError> {
        encode_input_0(input, self.inner.input_mut(0));
        self.inner.run()?;
        let output = decode_output_0(self.inner.output(0));
        Ok(output)
    }
}

pub fn new_runner() -> Result<Runner, xlsynth::XlsynthError> {
    Runner::new()
}
